## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential fit for an events-focused marketing role at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/BzKFRoVM34xyyutEVz_2aursmD3JzzBd?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai seeks to run high-quality, targeted events (dinners, conferences) for CMOs/marketers](https://fathom.video/share/BzKFRoVM34xyyutEVz_2aursmD3JzzBd?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Role involves planning internal events and potentially client events; 30-40% travel expected](https://fathom.video/share/BzKFRoVM34xyyutEVz_2aursmD3JzzBd?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [Company has AI-driven growth marketing focus; word-of-mouth/referrals key to sales](https://fathom.video/share/BzKFRoVM34xyyutEVz_2aursmD3JzzBd?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Jillian has diverse events experience across tech companies, including Trust Radius and Sambanova](https://fathom.video/share/BzKFRoVM34xyyutEVz_2aursmD3JzzBd?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)

## Topics

### growthx.ai's Event Strategy

  - [Monthly/bi-monthly executive dinners in SF/NY targeting CMOs](https://fathom.video/share/BzKFRoVM34xyyutEVz_2aursmD3JzzBd?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [Small user conference (150 people) planned for Oct/Nov](https://fathom.video/share/BzKFRoVM34xyyutEVz_2aursmD3JzzBd?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [Monthly CMO breakfasts in Bay Area office](https://fathom.video/share/BzKFRoVM34xyyutEVz_2aursmD3JzzBd?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [Co-hosted events with VCs, larger companies to share leads](https://fathom.video/share/BzKFRoVM34xyyutEVz_2aursmD3JzzBd?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [Potentially offering event services to clients](https://fathom.video/share/BzKFRoVM34xyyutEVz_2aursmD3JzzBd?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)

### Jillian's Relevant Experience

  - [Ran field marketing at Trust Radius, leveraging partnerships for cost-effective events](https://fathom.video/share/BzKFRoVM34xyyutEVz_2aursmD3JzzBd?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Managed 500-650 person user conferences for real estate marketing company](https://fathom.video/share/BzKFRoVM34xyyutEVz_2aursmD3JzzBd?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
  - [Led 60+ events in 2024 at Sambanova, including international shows](https://fathom.video/share/BzKFRoVM34xyyutEVz_2aursmD3JzzBd?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [Experience with attribution, lead routing, and working with sales teams post-event](https://fathom.video/share/BzKFRoVM34xyyutEVz_2aursmD3JzzBd?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)

### Event ROI and Audience Engagement

  - [Focus on making events meaningful for high-level attendees (CMOs)](https://fathom.video/share/BzKFRoVM34xyyutEVz_2aursmD3JzzBd?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Balance between immediate deal closure and long-term relationship building](https://fathom.video/share/BzKFRoVM34xyyutEVz_2aursmD3JzzBd?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
  - [Previous success with word-of-mouth/referral-driven sales models](https://fathom.video/share/BzKFRoVM34xyyutEVz_2aursmD3JzzBd?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)

### Operational Considerations

  - [growthx.ai has a small team; role would be very hands-on](https://fathom.video/share/BzKFRoVM34xyyutEVz_2aursmD3JzzBd?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [Office manager available to assist with on-site logistics](https://fathom.video/share/BzKFRoVM34xyyutEVz_2aursmD3JzzBd?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)
  - [Bridget emphasizes need for proactivity and ability to "get things done"](https://fathom.video/share/BzKFRoVM34xyyutEVz_2aursmD3JzzBd?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bridget to discuss role specifics with CEO (Marcel) and Head of Growth (Jason)](https://fathom.video/share/BzKFRoVM34xyyutEVz_2aursmD3JzzBd?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)
  - [Potential follow-up conversation with Jillian](https://fathom.video/share/BzKFRoVM34xyyutEVz_2aursmD3JzzBd?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)
  - [If moving forward, Jillian likely to meet with Marcel and Jason in interview process](https://fathom.video/share/BzKFRoVM34xyyutEVz_2aursmD3JzzBd?tab=summary&timestamp=1871.0)
